surfaces.trigger: Open the primary navigation or product switcher
surfaces.primaryJob: Know where I am and move to the right Signal Studio surface.

surfaces.trigger: Open Products in the Studio header
surfaces.primaryJob: Understand the four product roles before switching.

surfaces.trigger: Press Control or Command K inside Signal HQ
surfaces.primaryJob: Reach any HQ room without hunting through navigation.

surfaces.trigger: Use the persistent Signal HQ room navigation
surfaces.primaryJob: Know which private operating environment is active and reach the right HQ room.
surfaces.primaryAction: Open an HQ room or command palette.

surfaces.trigger: Open pipeline mode on HQ CRM
surfaces.primaryJob: See venue conversations by stage and next action.

surfaces.trigger: Filter the HQ Atlas
surfaces.primaryJob: Narrow the system map to the records I need.
surfaces.primaryAction: Choose a filter or search result.

surfaces.trigger: Open the Tasks command palette
surfaces.primaryJob: Find work or run a common action from the keyboard.

surfaces.trigger: Open a task from a workspace view
surfaces.primaryJob: Read and update one task without losing workspace context.

surfaces.trigger: Open quick create
surfaces.primaryJob: Capture a task without leaving the current view.

surfaces.trigger: Open an app view with no work
surfaces.primaryJob: Understand what to do first in an empty workspace.

surfaces.trigger: Open or focus a timeline milestone
surfaces.primaryJob: Understand one milestone, its date, and its state.

surfaces.trigger: Press ? on a public timeline to open keyboard shortcuts
surfaces.primaryJob: Learn the available timeline keyboard controls without losing context.
surfaces.primaryAction: Read the shortcuts and return to the previous control.

surfaces.trigger: Open a generated briefing
surfaces.primaryJob: See the few things that need attention today.
surfaces.primaryAction: Open the source work or give feedback.

surfaces.trigger: Use the audience scenario radio group
surfaces.primaryJob: Compare realistic briefing examples for different kinds of work.

surfaces.trigger: Open the signed-in notebook
surfaces.primaryJob: Capture, find, shape, and promote notes without changing tools.

surfaces.trigger: Save the first note
surfaces.primaryJob: Know that the first capture is safely held.

surfaces.trigger: Open the notebook with capture-email availability resolved
surfaces.primaryJob: Know whether email capture is available and copy the address when entitled.
surfaces.primaryAction: Copy the capture address or review the Workspace plan.

surfaces.trigger: Start or show a review session
surfaces.primaryJob: Know that a review session is active and reach its controls.
surfaces.primaryAction: Enter comment mode or open the issue panel.

surfaces.trigger: Open the review issue panel
surfaces.primaryJob: Review and order captured observations in the active local session before handoff.
surfaces.primaryAction: Open a captured issue or export the session to Signal HQ or an AI agent.

surfaces.trigger: Pin an element or region during comment mode
surfaces.primaryJob: Turn a visual observation into structured capture evidence.

surfaces.trigger: Start recording the current tab
surfaces.primaryJob: Know that recording is active and stop it safely.
